# Parquet to CSV Converter - Creates Single CSV Files

input_folder = "abfss://vict@navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net/parquet_csv"
output_folder = "abfss://vict@navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net/parquet_csv/output"

from notebookutils import mssparkutils

print(f"Scanning folder: {input_folder}\n")

files_list = mssparkutils.fs.ls(input_folder)
parquet_files = [(f.name, f.path) for f in files_list if f.name.endswith('.parquet')]

print(f"Found {len(parquet_files)} parquet files\n")

for file_name, file_path in parquet_files:
    try:
        csv_name = file_name.replace('.parquet', '.csv')
        temp_output_path = f"{output_folder}/{file_name.replace('.parquet', '_temp')}"
        final_csv_path = f"{output_folder}/{csv_name}"
        
        print(f"Processing: {file_name}")
        
        # Read parquet
        df = spark.read.parquet(file_path)
        
        # Write to temporary folder
        df.coalesce(1).write.mode("overwrite").option("header", "true").csv(temp_output_path)
        
        # Find the actual CSV part file
        temp_files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(temp_output_path)
        csv_part_file = [f.path for f in temp_files if f.name.startswith("part-") and f.name.endswith(".csv")][0]
        
        # Move the part file to final location with proper name
        mssparkutils.fs.mv(csv_part_file, final_csv_path, True)
        
        # Delete the temporary folder
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(temp_output_path, True)
        
        print(f"  ✓ Created: {csv_name}\n")
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ✗ Error: {str(e)}\n")

print("Done! CSV files are in the output folder.")

# Parquet to CSV - Using Synapse Local Temp Storage

import pandas as pd
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
import os

problem_files = [
    'ECEvents_08042026.parquet',
    'vesselvisits_08042026.parquet', 
    'work_instruction_08042026.parquet'
]

input_folder = "abfss://vict@navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net/parquet_csv"
output_folder = "abfss://vict@navispowerbidatastorage2.dfs.core.windows.net/parquet_csv/output"

# Create temp directory
temp_dir = "/tmp/parquet_csv_conversion"
os.makedirs(temp_dir, exist_ok=True)

for file_name in problem_files:
    try:
        input_path = f"{input_folder}/{file_name}"
        csv_name = file_name.replace('.parquet', '.csv')
        output_path = f"{output_folder}/{csv_name}"
        
        local_parquet = f"{temp_dir}/{file_name}"
        local_csv = f"{temp_dir}/{csv_name}"
        
        print(f"Processing: {file_name}")
        
        # Copy parquet from blob to local temp
        print("  Downloading parquet...")
        mssparkutils.fs.cp(input_path, f"file://{local_parquet}", True)
        
        # Read with pandas
        print("  Converting to CSV...")
        df = pd.read_parquet(local_parquet, engine='pyarrow')
        
        # Write CSV locally
        df.to_csv(local_csv, index=False)
        
        # Upload CSV to blob
        print("  Uploading CSV...")
        mssparkutils.fs.cp(f"file://{local_csv}", output_path, True)
        
        # Cleanup
        os.remove(local_parquet)
        os.remove(local_csv)
        
        print(f"  ✓ Success: {csv_name} ({len(df)} rows)\n")
        
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ✗ Failed: {str(e)}\n")

print("Done!")
